verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the days when the Roman empire is revived And the beast is given power In the time of economic wars and strife I set my face towards heaven T‘was at that time that I heard from the angel in the pulpit Saying arise Oh Daniels Seven Church Ages are all gone The gentile days are over Arise and do you work So I press towards the mark Of the high calling in Christ With my eyes fixed on the prize I can’t afford to compromise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I cry Lord (Lord come) Nations now are breaking (Lord come) Signs of judgments falling (Lord come How do I make it through the night (Lord come) And I cry Lord (Lord come) The enemy’s approaching (Lord come) I need Your Holy Spirit (Lord come) I want to see the vision right (Lord come) I need a manifested life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yea do I walk through the valley of death I shall fear no evil For I know when the enemy comes like a flood I’m raise as a standard And though I see many fall to my left and my right I’m focused on the vision I will not be defiled with the meat of the king My God sustained me And he will deliver me And I press toward the mark of the high calling in Christ With my eyes fixed on the prize Can’t afford to compromise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I cry Lord (Lord come) Nations now are breaking (Lord come) Israel is awakening (Lord come) The pale horse riders rules the land (Lord come) And I cry Lord (Lord come) I need your Holy Spirit (Lord come) I need to know your will in me (Lord come) I want to see the vision right (Lord come) Give me a manifested life

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I cry Lord (Lord come) I see genocide and warfare( Lord come) Men’s hearts are failing for fear (Lord come) Let our lamps be filled and clear (Lord come) And I cry Lord (Lord come) Soon I’ll leave this body (Lord come) That’s constantly against me (Lord come) And very soon I’ll take my flight (Lord come) Till then I’m running for my life
